case_title: EKATERINA SMITH VS. JOSEPH RICHARD WETZEL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SMITH, EKATERINA AS TO DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.50) SERVED OCT-04-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH RICHARD
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH RICHARD
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-01-2008 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. TO BE HEARD WITH CASE NO. 827032.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, EKATERINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH RICHARD $5,781.15 PRINCIPAL, $134.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,915.65, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $6423.50, AND ATTRIBUTES 90% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH WETZEL. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH RICHARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
